name: Mount Pelée
eruptionHistory: The 1902 eruption destroyed the city of Saint-Pierre, killing approximately 29,000 people — the deadliest volcanic eruption of the 20th century. Small eruption in 1929-1932.
description: Mount Pelée's 1902 eruption was the deadliest of the 20th century. The pyroclastic flow that destroyed Saint-Pierre in minutes left only 2-3 survivors and introduced the term 'nuée ardente.'
